title: Summit Aqua Fruit Infuser Bottle [Colors May Vary]
features: Built in squeezer for citrus fruits
description: Aqua fruit infusion drinks bottle. 650ml   Simply fill the bottom section with your favourite fruit and add mineral water to the top section and enjoy a healthy fruit infusion drink in seconds!   Features: Built in squeezer for citrus fruits BPA free construction Three bright fun colours Integral folding straw Hanging loop Combinations only limited by your imagination!
